scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/ui lint && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/effects lint && corepack pnpm --filter web lint
scripts.format: corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/ui format && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/effects format && corepack pnpm --filter web format
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/ui typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/effects typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter web typecheck
scripts.check: corepack pnpm resources:images && corepack pnpm catalog:validate && corepack pnpm readme:generate && corepack pnpm registry:generate && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
scripts.ready: corepack pnpm doctor && corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm links:check && corepack pnpm test:e2e
